issue_title: Mission Control shows Gateway offline/WebSocket error against reachable OpenClaw gateway in Docker; logs show 404 endpoints + read-only config write attempt
issue_body_preview:
I’m running OpenClaw and Mission Control in separate Docker containers on the same Docker network.

What works

• Mission Control can reach the OpenClaw gateway over TCP:
• TCP_OK openclaw:18789
• Mission Control can read and parse openclaw.json
• OpenClaw Control UI works in the same environment

M
test_description_zh: 在 Docker 环境中部署 Mission Control 和 OpenClaw 网关（位于同一 Docker 网络），打开 Mission Control 首页，观察网关连接状态指示和 WebSocket 连接情况。
expected_result_zh: Mission Control 首页应正确显示网关为在线状态，WebSocket 连接正常建立，无离线错误提示或 WebSocket 错误信息；页面能够正常与可达的 OpenClaw 网关通信并展示数据。
